title: /.well-known/webfinger
summary: Well-known URI suffix "/.well-known/webfinger". IANA status: permanent. Defined in RFC7033.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Wed, 13 May 2026 18:41:21 GMT

raw_columns.Related Information:
The query to the WebFinger resource will
include one or more parameters in the query string; see Section 4.1
of [RFC7033].  Resources at this location are able to return a JSON
Resource Descriptor (JRD) as described in Section 4.4 of [RFC7033].
